task_description: 2:toss_miniapp_developer Implement the approved iPhone 13 mini SLA contract in toss-plant-growth-miniapp. Guarantee filtered preview under 5 seconds only for JPEG/high-compatibility photos; detect HEIC/HEIF from cheap mime/header classification before any full decode and route HEIC to a fast fallback instead of a long filtered-preview wait; preserve photo quality on the supported JPEG path; add tests, instrumentation, and required UX copy; keep typecheck/lint/test/build green.
staffing_summary: quality-reviewer x1 (primary delivery lane, medium reasoning); test-engineer x1 (verification + regression lane, medium reasoning); build-fixer x1 (specialist support lane, medium reasoning)
